#cloud-config

hostname: frontend-gjm
preserve_hostname: false

ssh_pwauth: true

users:
  - name: jgm
    groups: sudo,adm
    shell: /bin/bash
    sudo: ALL=(ALL) NOPASSWD:ALL
    lock_passwd: true
    ssh_authorized_keys:
      - ssh-rsa  @infra3

package_update: true
package_upgrade: true

packages:
  - nginx
  - git
  - curl
  - ca-certificates

write_files:
  - path: /etc/nginx/sites-available/default
    permissions: "0644"
    content: |
      server {
          listen 80 default_server;
          listen [::]:80 default_server;
          server_name _;
          root /var/www/html;
          index index.html;

          location / {
              try_files $uri $uri/ /index.html;
          }
      }

runcmd:
  - curl -fsSL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_20.x | bash -
  - apt-get install -y nodejs
  - git clone https://github.com/marcosdayanm/tec-final-assessment/ /opt/tec-final-assessment || true
  - bash -lc 'cat > /opt/tec-final-assessment/frontend/.env.production <<EOF
    VITE_API_URL=__LB_PUBLIC_URL__
    VITE_WS_URL=__LB_WS_URL__
    EOF'
  - cd /opt/tec-final-assessment/frontend && npm ci && npm run build
  - rm -rf /var/www/html/*
  - cp -r /opt/tec-final-assessment/frontend/dist/* /var/www/html/
  - chown -R www-data:www-data /var/www/html
  - systemctl enable nginx
  - systemctl restart nginx

chpasswd:
  list: |
    jgm:__SYSTEM_PASSWORD__
  expire: false
